exception.message: Failed to parse the JSON document
exception.full-stacktrace: io.restassured.path.json.exception.JsonPathException: Failed to parse the JSON document at io.restassured.path.json.JsonPath$ExceptionCatcher.invoke(JsonPath.java:1002) at
